patch.value: standup --compare <path> reads a prior standup JSON (exporter --format json shape), computes per-section count deltas (in_progress/blocked/done/up_next), renders directional indicators in Block Kit footer + markdown/text output; missing/malformed file degrades gracefully (stderr warning, normal render, no crash); pure local file read; round-trips with the exporter JSON counts; unit tests + README + changelog regenerated; release:check green.

value.author: codex
value.text:
DESIGN & RESULTS — --compare standup trend deltas

PRIOR-STANDUP JSON SHAPE (consumed by --compare):
The reader (readPriorCounts/extractPriorCounts) accepts the EXACT JSON the exporter ('standup export --format json') already writes — its top-level 'counts' object: { wip, blocked, done, upNext, total }. No exporter change was needed (the counts already existed); --compare keys off it. For robustness the reader ALSO accepts canonical SectionKey spellings (in_progress/up_next) and, if 'counts' is absent, falls back to counting the exporter's 'sections_data' arrays (in_progress/blocked/done/up_next, with wip/upNext aliases). Counts are coerced to non-negative ints; missing sections default to 0.

DELTA RENDERING:
computeDeltas(prior,current) -> SectionDelta[] over ALL_SECTIONS order: { key, prior, current, delta=current-prior, direction(up>0/down<0/flat=0) }. Glyphs: up=▲ down=▼ flat=→ (TREND_GLYPH). formatDelta -> 'In Progress ▲+2' / 'Blocked ▼-1' / 'Done →0'. renderTrendLine -> 'Trend vs prior: In Progress ▲+2 · Blocked ▼-1 · Done →0 · Up Next →0'. Wired via new optional StandupOptions.trend field. buildTextMessage appends a trend footer line (markdown wraps it in _italics_; slack/plain leave plain). buildBlockKit appends the trend as a SECOND mrkdwn element in the existing 'context' footer block (keeps the meta line distinct). currentCounts(data) maps StandupData -> SectionCounts.

GRACEFUL DEGRADATION:
readPriorCounts catches (a) fs read failure (ENOENT/EACCES/etc), (b) JSON.parse failure, (c) no recognizable counts — each emits ONE 'warning:' stderr line via injectable warn sink and returns undefined; the handler then leaves opts.trend unset so the standup renders NORMALLY without deltas, exit 0, never throws. Pure local read via fs.readFileSync(resolve(path)) — NO network.

ROUND-TRIP WITH EXPORTER:
Verified end-to-end in a throwaway pm workspace: 'standup export --format json --output prev.json' wrote counts {wip:1,blocked:0,done:0,upNext:2}; after moving one open->in_progress, 'standup --dry-run --format markdown --compare prev.json' rendered 'Trend vs prior: In Progress ▲+1 · Blocked →0 · Done →0 · Up Next ▼-1' — correct. Missing-file run emitted the warning + rendered normally, exit 0. A unit test ('exporter JSON round-trips through extractPriorCounts') asserts the exporter's counts shape == currentCounts(data).

TESTS (13 new, units.test.ts; framework: node:test): currentCounts mapping; computeDeltas up/down/flat signed; formatDelta glyphs; renderTrendLine join + empty; extractPriorCounts (counts wip/upNext keys; canonical keys; sections_data fallback; undefined for junk/null/total-only); round-trip shape; readPriorCounts (real tmp file; missing-file warn+undefined no-throw; malformed JSON + wrong-shape warn+undefined); trend renders in markdown+plain+slack text; trend renders as 2nd Block Kit context element; both backward-compat (no trend => no line / single footer element).

VERIFY: npm run release:check GREEN — typecheck ok, build ok, 60 tests pass / 0 fail, audit:prod 0 vulnerabilities, pack dry-run ok, changelog:check up to date. README updated (Features bullet, flags table row, Export note, examples, dedicated 'Trend deltas' section). Branch feat/standup-trends; NOT pushed, no PR.

patch.value: Implemented standup compare trend deltas with robust fallback behavior
